name: performance_optimizer
description: Performance optimization skill for profiling searches, suggesting tstats conversions, optimizing lookups, and tuning limits.conf.
author: ObsAI Team

max_tstats_fields.description: Maximum number of fields for tstats conversion analysis

actions.name: profile_search
actions.description: Profile an SPL query for performance bottlenecks by analyzing command pipeline, data scope, and resource usage patterns.

actions.name: suggest_tstats
actions.description: Analyze an SPL query to determine if it can be converted to tstats for better performance.

query.description: The SPL query to analyze for tstats conversion

actions.name: optimize_lookups
actions.description: Suggest lookup optimization strategies based on lookup usage patterns in a query.

query.description: SPL query containing lookup commands to optimize

actions.name: tune_limits
actions.description: Suggest limits.conf tuning based on query patterns and workload characteristics.
